name: calendar-toolbar
title: Calendar Toolbar
description: Controlled navigation and view-switching toolbar for `CalendarRoot`.

files.content:
"use client"

export { CalendarToolbar } from "./internal/elements/toolbar"
export type { CalendarToolbarProps } from "./internal/shared"

docs: Install alongside `calendar-core` with `npx shadcn@latest add @calendarcn/calendar-core @calendarcn/calendar-toolbar`. Import `CalendarToolbar` from `@/components/calendar/toolbar`.
